depth 包清单
============

检测
  detect_core.py  detect.py  hiagent_api.py  config.yaml  openapi.yaml
  verify_weights.py

深度
  depth_core.py  depth_detect.py  depth_api.py  config_depth.yaml
  depth_anything_v2/  verify_depth_weights.py

流水线（检测+深度）
  pipeline_vlm.py

环境
  一键安装.bat  setup.ps1  setup.sh  requirements.txt
  verify_env.py  scripts/download_all_weights.py
  scripts/download_detect_weights.py  scripts/download_depth_weights.py

启动
  启动检测.bat / run_detect.ps1
  启动深度.bat / run_depth.ps1
  启动检测API.bat / run_detect_api.ps1 / run_detect_api.sh
  启动深度API.bat / run_depth_api.ps1 / run_depth_api.sh
  启动流水线.bat / run_pipeline.ps1

权重
  weights/unified/yolo26x_unified.pt
  weights/depth/depth_anything_v2_vits.pth

目录
  input/  output/detect/  output/depth/  output/pipeline/

文档 USE.txt
